name: agent-reach
tagline: Routes internet research/search requests to platform-specific CLIs and APIs across 15 sites (Xiaohongshu, Twitter, Reddit, LinkedIn.
verdict: Broad platform router with good doctor/failure-retry discipline, but the description promises a finance/Xueqiu category the routing table and reference docs never implement, cookies are solicited from the user with no stated secure channel, several niche CLIs are invoked with no upfront availability check, the description wall exceeds 500 chars, and there.

highlights.summary: '获取安装指南' fetches an external install.md and has the agent auto-configure the channel from it, plus relays an update link to the user.
'用户只需提供 cookies，其他配置由agent完成' solicits browser session cookies with no stated secure storage/channel.
frontmatter triggers list a 'finance' category (雪球/股票/stock) but the 路由表 routing table and 详细文档 list never mention finance or a finance.md.
